title: Trilegal appoints Sandeep Ghosh as first Chief Executive Officer
description: Trilegal has announced the appointment of Sandeep Ghosh as its first Chief Executive Officer (CEO).Commenting on the appointment, Partners and Members of the Management Committee at Trilegal Nishant Parikh and Sridhar Gorthi, said, “Trilegal is at an important point in its journey, and this is the right time to strengthen our institutional capabilities for the next phase of growth. Sandeep brings exceptional leadership experience, a strong track record of transformation, and the abilit
